summary: Migrated the study page route to a GOV.UK Nunjucks template, added the study page SCSS source, registered generated CSS output, updated readiness hydration and resolved Codex review comments.

codexReviewItems.item: Provide a textarea value before rendering.
Keep readiness markup wired to the controller.
Preserve CSS target literals or update source tests.

connectorVerification: Confirmed PR #345 is open and mergeable.
Confirmed Codex review threads are resolved.
Confirmed the study template uses GOV.UK macros.
Confirmed the controller hydrates GOV.UK task-list readiness IDs.
Confirmed src/styles/study-page.scss generates public/css/study-page.css through the generated CSS target manifest.

residualRisk: The PR should not be considered complete until normal checks pass on the latest branch head.
